blocks.text: Match preview: Norway Women face Luxembourg Women in 1st Match (T20) on Fri, 26 Jun, 2026, 2:30 pm at Scott Page Field, Vinor Prague. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Mainly clear · High 36°C / Low 22°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 12 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
